evalAfter: (async()=>{const p=document.querySelector('#app').__vue_app__._container._vnode.component.proxy;const sess={rol:'Administrador',nombre:'Test Admin',id:'admin',loginAt:Date.now()};localStorage.setItem('ps_session',JSON.stringify(sess));p.session=sess;await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300));p.goModule('facturacion');await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,9000));const bal=document.querySelector('.fac-mod-l #fac-balanza-panel');const emit=document.querySelector('.fac-mod-l .fac-emit-cta');const mrow=document.querySelector('.fac-mod-l #fac-muelle-row');const tab=document.querySelector('#fac-tabbar');const slot=document.querySelector('.fac-mod-r #fac-slot');const shell=document.querySelector('.fac-mod-shell2');return {shell:!!shell,balInL:!!bal,emitInL:!!emit,muelleInL:!!mrow,tabbar:!!tab,slotInR:!!slot,slotText:(slot&&slot.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').slice(0,120)};})()
